goal: Review WeChat and Toutiao benchmark cases for a pro-first finance decision-journal account
commercial_center: professional investors, research users, and high-participation retail investors who pay for better judgment structure

cases.title: “秦朔朋友圈”正式开张
cases.account_positioning: 商业财经投资 commentary with authority-led trust
cases.notes: Useful as a WeChat authority-led acquisition benchmark, but not a direct product benchmark.
copy_signals: 用更高一级的问题意识切入，而不是从具体工具讲起
avoid_signals: 不要假设自己有同等创始人声望

cases.title: 伊朗总统坠亡，跟咱有关系吗？
cases.account_positioning: industry and enterprise interpretation for broad business readers
cases.affected_group: broad business readers trying to understand why the event matters
cases.notes: Strong public-facing wrapper benchmark. High acquisition fit, weaker direct monetization lesson.

cases.title: 见闻主编精选 / 必读
cases.account_positioning: high-frequency finance readers paying to reduce selection cost
cases.affected_group: serious finance readers with repeated information overload
cases.notes: Below the 10w threshold but an essential commercial-fit benchmark because it proves users pay for selection and speed.

cases.title: 市值风云微信内容模型
cases.notes: Not a 10w+ WeChat case, but a strong commercial exception benchmark because buyer quality outruns public virality.

cases.title: 三亚民宿老板，等不到今年春节
cases.account_positioning: deep business storytelling with finance and operator relevance
cases.affected_group: holiday homestay operators under policy and demand stress
cases.notes: Very strong Toutiao acquisition benchmark for public-facing packaging and consequence-led framing.

cases.title: 市值风云头条内容模型
cases.notes: Another below-threshold commercial exception. Useful to prove Toutiao can still feed a narrower high-value audience.
